title: Sainik School Kalikiri Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for PGT and TGT Posts
short_info: Sainik School Kalikiri has released an official notification for the recruitment of 5 PGT and TGT Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 02-06-2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification for details.

qualification.education_qualification: Integrated Post Graduate Course from NCTE recognised institution with B.Ed. component, Master Degree with B.Ed. from NCTE recognised institution, Three years integrated B.Ed. – M.Ed from NCTE recognised institution, Four years Integrated degree including B.Ed. component, Qualified in CTET Paper-II
qualification.details: PGT (English): Integrated Post Graduate Course from NCTE recognised institution in English with at least 50% marks including B.Ed. component OR Master Degree in English with 50% marks AND B.Ed. with 50% marks OR Three years integrated B.Ed. – M.Ed with 50% marks OR Four years Integrated degree with 50% marks including B.Ed. component. PGT (Mathematics): Integrated Post Graduate Course from NCTE recognised institution in Mathematics with at least 50% marks including B.Ed. component OR Master Degree in Mathematics with 50% marks AND B.Ed. with 50% marks OR Three years integrated B.Ed. – M.Ed with 50% marks OR Four years Integrated degree with 50% marks including B.Ed. component. TGT (Science): Four years integrated degree course from NCTE recognised institution with at least 50% marks in concerned subject including B.Ed. component OR Bachelors/Honours Degree with 50% marks and B.Ed. – M.Ed with 50% marks OR Post Graduation in Science with 55% marks and three years integrated B.Ed. – M.Ed with 50% marks; Qualified in CTET Paper-II. TGT (Mathematics): Four years integrated degree course from NCTE recognised institution with at least 50% marks in Mathematics including B.Ed. component OR Bachelors/Honours Degree with 50% marks in Mathematics and B.Ed. – M.Ed with 50% marks OR Post Graduation in Mathematics with 55% marks and three years integrated B.Ed. – M.Ed with 50% marks; Qualified in CTET Paper-II. TGT (English): Four years integrated degree course from NCTE recognised institution with at least 50% marks in English including B.Ed. component OR Bachelors/Honours Degree with 50% marks in English and B.Ed. – M.Ed with 50% marks OR Post Graduation in English with 55% marks and three years integrated B.Ed. – M.Ed with 50% marks; Qualified in CTET Paper-II.

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Classroom Demonstration Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Sainik School Kalikiri Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://sskal.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
